title: Badgers take first and second place at national Cast in Steel competition
summary_en: Students from the Department of Materials Science and Engineering and the Department of Mechanical Engineering worked together to bring home both first and second place at the 2026 Cast in Steel national competition, an impressive…
title_cn: 獾队在全国铸钢竞赛中分获冠亚军
summary_cn: 近期，全国铸钢竞赛顺利举办，以“獾队”为参赛标识的院校代表队在赛事中表现优异，分获第一名、第二名。本次竞赛是国内材料工程教育领域的重要学科竞赛活动，旨在考查相关专业学生的理论应用能力与实践操作水平。

title: New tuition model makes UW-Madison online engineering graduate programs more affordable
summary_en: The University of Wisconsin-Madison College of Engineering has introduced a new tuition model for most of its online engineering graduate programs, expanding access for working professionals while maintaining the academic rigor and reputation of a…
title_cn: 新型学费模式降低威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校在线工程研究生项目就读成本

title: To power our nation’s progress, we’re supercharging the energy superhighway
summary_en: The energy sector is transforming rapidly. Renewable, distributed energy sources like solar, wind, battery storage and small nuclear reactors will continue to change how energy enters the grid. Massive data centers are spiking demand. The…
title_cn: 为推动国家发展 加速建设教育赋能高速通道
summary_cn: 近期，国家教育主管部门紧扣服务国家发展核心任务部署专项工作，明确将以高质量教育体系建设为抓手，加快构建教育资源高效供给、发展动能快速转化的支撑通道，切实发挥教育对经济社会发展的基础性、先导性、全局性支撑引领作用。
